revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Izanagi-jinja (Ikoma)]][[ja:伊弉諾神社 (生駒市)]] {{Expand Japanese|伊弉諾神社 (生駒市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Izanagi Shrine (Q11379365) | native_name = 伊弉諾神社 | image = Chokyuji Ikoma Nara Japan17n.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Izanagi Shrine (Q11379365) | coordinates = {{coord|34.718304|135.727672}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Izanagi|lt=Izanagi|ar|إزاناغي|az|İzanaqi|bcl|Izanagi|bn|ইজানাগি|bs|Izanagi|ca|Izanagi|cs|Izanagi a Izanami|da|Izanagi|el|Ιζανάγκι|en|Izanagi|eo|Izanagi|es|Izanagi|fa|ایزاناگی|fi|Izanaki|fr|Izanagi|he|איזאנגי|hr|Izanagi|hu|Izanagi|id|Izanagi|it|Izanagi|ja|イザナギ|ka|იძანაგი|ko|이자나기|lt|Idzanagis|mk|Изанаги|mni|ꯏꯓꯥꯅꯥꯒꯤ|no|Izanagi|or|ଇଜାନାଗି|pt|Izanagi|ro|Izanagi|ru|Идзанаги|simple|Izanagi|sk|Izanagi|sl|Izanagi|sr|Изанаки|sv|Izanagi|ta|இசநாகி|th|อิซานางิ|tl|Izanagi|tr|İzanagi|uk|Ідзанаґі|vi|Izanagi|zh|伊邪那岐|qid=Q813858|1=Izanagi}} | established = {'time': '+0746-00-00T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 9, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985786'} }} {{nihongo|'''Izanagi Shrine'''|伊弉諾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Chinjusha|lt=chinjusha|en|Chinjusha|fr|Chinjusha|it|Chinjusha|ja|鎮守社|qid=Q13479654|1=Chinjusha}} * Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135009132|ltq=Q135009132|qid=Q135009132|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings}} * {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}} * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11433427|ltq=Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} ** Series ordinal: 32 ** P155: {{ill|Sugata Shrine|lt=Sugata Shrine|ja|菅田神社 (大和郡山市)|qid=Q134888232|1=Sugata Shrine (Yamatokōriyama)}} ** P156: {{ill|Q246455|ltq=Q246455|qid=Q246455|1=Tatsuta Taisha}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q124692438|ltq=Q124692438|qid=Q124692438|1=Kamimachi}} * {{ill|Yamato Province|lt=Yamato Province|be|Ямата (правінцыя)|ca|Província de Yamato|ckb|پارێزگای یەماتۆ|cs|Provincie Jamato|de|Provinz Yamato|el|Επαρχία Γιαμάτο|en|Yamato Province|es|Provincia de Yamato|fa|ولایت یاماتو|fi|Yamaton provinssi|fr|Province de Yamato|gl|Provincia de Yamato|hak|Yamato-koet|id|Provinsi Yamato|it|Yamato (provincia)|ja|大和国|ko|야마토국|lt|Jamato žemė|nl|Yamato (provincie)|no|Yamato (provins)|pt|Província de Yamato|ro|Provincia Yamato|ru|Ямато (провинция)|simple|Yamato Province|sk|Jamato (provincia)|sr|Провинција Јамато|th|แคว้นยามาโตะ|tr|Yamato (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Ямато|ur|یاماتو صوبہ|zh_min_nan|Yamato-kok|zh_yue|大和國|zh|大和國|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}} * Japan17n.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q813858|ltq=Q813858|qid=Q813858|1=Izanagi}} == time of earliest written record (P1249) == * {'time': '+0859-00-00T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 9, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985786'} == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20041123080859/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22837 == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 180691 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Son-sha|lt=Son-sha|ja|村社|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == location (P276) == * {{ill|Chōkyū-ji Temple|lt=Chōkyū-ji Temple|de|Chōkyū-ji|gan|長弓寺|ja|長弓寺|qid=Q11652985|1=Chōkyū-ji Temple}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 9150005002381 == Commons category (P373) == * Izanagi-jinja (Ikoma) == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県生駒市上町', 'language': 'ja'} == image of entrance (P9721) == * Chokyuji Ikoma Nara Japan02n.jpg {{commons category|Category:Izanagi-jinja (Ikoma)}} [[JA:伊弉諾神社 (生駒市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11379365}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称=Izanagi Shrine |画像=[[File:Chokyuji Ikoma Nara Japan17n.jpg|250px]]
Precincts |所在地={{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ikoma|Q328610|qid=Q328610|1=Ikoma, Nara}}{{ill|lt=Kamimachi (Ikoma)|Q124692438|qid=Q124692438|lt=Kamimachi|1=Kamimachi}} 4447 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|43|6|N|135|43|40|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark_scale:15000|display=inline,title}} |祭神={{ill|lt=Izanagi|Q813858|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi}}
{{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}
{{ill|lt=Ōkuninushi|Q276944|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi}} |社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}（great）, former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建={{ill|lt=Tenpyō|Q1199879|qid=Q1199879|1=Tenpyō}} 18 ({{ill|lt=746|Q23616|qid=Q23616|1=746}}) |本殿= |例祭={{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|qid=Q2921|1=October 10}} |地図= {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Izanagi Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|caption=|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} [[File:Chokyuji Ikoma Nara Japan02n.jpg|thumb|250px|Izanagi Shrine torii]] '''Izanagi Shrine''' (いざなぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ikoma|Q328610|qid=Q328610|1=Ikoma, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (great), and its former rank was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. It was the former {{ill|lt=guardian shrine|Q97479976|qid=Q97479976|lt=guardian shrine|1=Chinjugami}} of {{ill|lt=Chōkyū-ji|Q11652985|qid=Q11652985|1=Chōkyū-ji Temple}} and stands in its former {{ill|lt=precincts|Q11429002|qid=Q11429002|1=keidai}}. === History === It is identified with Ishanagi Shrine in Soekami District in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, though there is also a theory that this is {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Tomi Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} in the same district. At the founding of {{ill|lt=Chōkyū-ji|Q11652985|qid=Q11652985|1=Chōkyū-ji Temple}} in {{ill|lt=746|Q23616|qid=Q23616|1=746}} (Tenpyō 18), {{ill|lt=Gozu Tennō|Q11570247|qid=Q11570247|1=Gozu Tennō}} was enshrined as the main guardian deity and {{ill|lt=Hachioji-sha|UNKNOWN|lt=Hachioji}} as the junior shrine''Chōkyū-ji Engi'', and it was founded as Gozu Tennō Shrine. It is recorded that in {{ill|lt=859|Q23897|qid=Q23897|1=859}} ({{ill|lt=Jōgan|Q1075635|qid=Q1075635|1=Jōgan}} 1), it was promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to {{ill|lt=Junior Fifth Upper|Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}}''{{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q1052981|lt=Sandai Jitsuroku|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'' entry for Jōgan 1, {{ill|lt=January 27 (lunar)|Q839032|qid=Q839032|lt=1st month 27th day|1=January 27 (Lunisolar)}} ({{ill|lt=March 9|Q2401|qid=Q2401|1=March 9}}, 859). Until the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, the senior monk of the temple served as shrine priest. There is also a record of fire in {{ill|lt=1474|Q6600|qid=Q6600|1=1474}} ({{ill|lt=Bunmei|Q1193544|qid=Q1193544|1=Bunmei}} 6)''Daijōin Jisha Zatsujiki'', Bunmei 6, {{ill|lt=June 2 (lunar)|Q839684|qid=Q839684|lt=6th month 2nd day|1=June 2 (Lunisolar)}} ({{ill|lt=July 24|Q2721|qid=Q2721|1=July 24}}, 1474). With {{ill|lt=shinbutsu bunri|Q1970535|qid=Q1970535|1=Shinbutsu bunri}} in the {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} era, it became independent from Chōkyū-ji. The deity was changed from Gozu Tennō to {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, and {{ill|lt=Izanagi|Q813858|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi}} was newly added. Under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}, it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. A large {{ill|lt=torii|Q234731|qid=Q234731|1=Torii}} before the temple’s main gate encompasses the precinct area, and there is a Momoyama-period {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=stone lantern|1=UNKNOWN}} in the grounds. === Enshrined deities === * Main deities - {{ill|lt=Izanagi|Q813858|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi}}, {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|lt=Ōkuninushi|Q276944|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi}} === Precincts === * Honden * Haiden (wari-haiden) * Maidono * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Susanoo Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|lt=Kumano Shrine|Q3200355|qid=Q3200355|1=Kumano shrine}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Itsukushima Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|lt=Zennyo Ryūō|Q5931305|qid=Q5931305|1=Zennyo Ryūō}} shrine * Shrine office === Access === * From {{ill|lt=Tomio Station|Q7818922|qid=Q7818922|1=Tomio Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Nara Line|Q692386|qid=Q692386|1=Nara Line (Kintetsu)}}, take a {{ill|lt=Nara Kōtsū|Q11445000|qid=Q11445000|1=Nara Kotsu Bus Lines}} bus (bound for Takayama), get off at “Ikoma Kamimachi,” then 10 minutes on foot * From {{ill|lt=Gakuenmae Station (Nara)|Q5517704|qid=Q5517704|lt=Gakuenmae|1=Gakuen-mae Station (Nara)}} on the Kintetsu Nara Line, take a Nara Kōtsū bus (bound for Gakken Kita-Ikoma Station), get off at “Mayumi 4-chōme,” then 15 minutes on foot === References === * Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei (online), Shōgakukan (database based on Heibonsha’s ''Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei'', 1979-2002) === Related items === * {{ill|lt=Izanagi Shrines|Q11380918|qid=Q11380918|1=Izanagi Shrines}} - Izanagi shrines in various places {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=奈良県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Izanagi Shrine (Ikoma)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Izanagi Shrine (Ikoma)]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:生駒市の建築物]] [[Category:History of Ikoma City]]
